---
title: "Homework 12"
author: "T.J. Seislove"
date: "4/21/2026"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(readxl)
```

# Penguin Excel Spreadsheet

```{r}
torgersen <- read_xlsx("penguins.xlsx", sheet = "Torgersen Island", na = "NA")
biscoe <- read_xlsx("penguins.xlsx", sheet = "Biscoe Island", na = "NA")
dream <- read_xlsx("penguins.xlsx", sheet = "Dream Island", na = "NA")
```

^[Problem 1 Complete]
